case_title: MATEEL ENVIRONMENTAL JUSTICE FOUNDATION VS. ORS NASCO, INC.

docket_entries.description: LAW AND MOTION 301, PLAINTIFF MATEEL ENVIRONMENTAL JUSTICE FOUNDATION'S MOTION TO APPROVE PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENT AND FOR ENTRY OF CONSENT JUDGMENT IS CONTINUED TO DECEMBER 14, 2009 PER AGREEMENT OF THE PARTIES. JUDGE: PAUL H. ALVARADO, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN CSR # 8189
MINI-MINUTES FOR DEC-07-2009 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301

LAW AND MOTION 301, PLAINTIFF MATEEL ENVIRONMENTAL JUSTICE FOUNDATION'S MOTION TO APPROVE PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENT AND FOR ENTRY OF CONSENT JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. THE COURT FINDS EVERYTHING TO BE IN ORDER AND SETTLEMENT IS REASONABLE IN LIGHT OF THE FACTORS SET FORTH IN THE STATUTE. ORDER AND JUDGMENT WERE SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: A.
